settings.name: delay
settings.label: Delay in ms
settings.help: [Delay]||Delay after pageload before first beacon fires

settings.name: session_minutes
settings.label: Session minutes
settings.help: [Session]||Sliding expiry for beacon cookie, refreshed on each pageview||0 = browser session (ends when browser closes)

settings.name: collect_engagement
settings.label: Collect engagement
settings.help: [Engagement]||When yes, send scroll and time-on-page heartbeats

settings.name: geoip_database
settings.label: GeoIP database
settings.help: [GeoIP database]||Upload GeoLite2-City.mmdb for IP geolocation on the analytics dashboard.||Download from MaxMind GeoLite2 free tier: https://dev.maxmind.com/geoip/geolite2-free-geolocation-data — free account required.||The file is not redistributed with the core CMS repo because of MaxMind licensing. Per-project installs may include it locally; other distributions may omit it.||Without this file, geo reports on the dashboard show an error until the file is uploaded here.
